settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's Organic Weight Gainer is a 100% natural, Sunnah-blessed formula designed to help you build healthy mass, strengthen muscles, and support your body's energy needs — without artificial fillers or harmful additives.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Ideal for those who struggle to gain weight naturally, gym-goers looking to build lean muscle, or anyone who wants a clean, organic way to support healthy body mass and sustained energy levels.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Supports healthy, natural weight and muscle gain
Provides sustained energy for workouts and daily activity
Rich in natural proteins, healthy fats, and complex carbs
Aids muscle recovery and reduces fatigue after exercise
Free from artificial hormones, steroids, or chemicals
Sunnah-blessed blend crafted with 100% organic ingredients

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Mix 2 tablespoons with warm milk or water and stir well
Consume once or twice daily, ideally after your workout
For best results, take consistently for at least 8–12 weeks
Pair with a nutritious diet and regular exercise for optimal gains

settings.heading: A clean, organic formula to fuel healthy weight gain.
settings.subheading: Supported by nature, backed by tradition.

settings.heading: Your Daily Mass-Building Ritual
settings.step1_text: Mix 2 tablespoons with warm milk or water and stir well
settings.step2_text: Consume once or twice daily, ideally after your workout
settings.step3_text: Pair with a nutritious diet and regular exercise for optimal gains
settings.step4_text: Use consistently for 8–12 weeks for best and lasting results

settings.question: Is this weight gainer completely natural and organic?
settings.answer: Yes, Laushe's Weight Gainer is made from 100% organic, natural ingredients with no artificial additives, steroids, or synthetic hormones — just clean, wholesome nutrition to support healthy weight gain.

settings.question: How soon will I start seeing results?
settings.answer: Results vary, but most users notice improved energy and appetite within the first 2 weeks. With consistent use and a balanced diet, visible weight and muscle gain can be expected within 6–12 weeks.

settings.question: Can I use it without going to the gym?
settings.answer: Yes. While pairing it with exercise will maximize results, Laushe's Weight Gainer also supports healthy weight gain for those who want to naturally increase body mass through improved nutrition.

settings.question: How should I prepare and take it?
settings.answer: Mix 2 tablespoons into warm milk or water, stir well, and consume once or twice daily — ideally after a workout or as a nutritious meal supplement. Take consistently for the best results.

settings.question: Is it safe for teenagers and adults?
settings.answer: Laushe's Weight Gainer is made from natural, food-grade ingredients suitable for teenagers and adults. If you have any underlying health conditions, we recommend consulting your doctor before use.

settings.headline: Build a Healthier, Stronger You Naturally
settings.subtext: Gain healthy weight and build real strength with Laushe's 100% organic, Sunnah-blessed Weight Gainer — no shortcuts, no chemicals.
